title: Black Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials that adds a Black moon, giving players blindness
body:
![Black Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99f4b2051d47a878ad767f135f5ade3e09dbb3a3.png)
Can you survive the night Blind? During the very rare Black Moon event, you will have blindness for the entire night. Going underground won't save you.

All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco.

Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
